patient_intake: Thanks. Your intake was received successfully. A summary of your symptoms, preferred appointment time, and contact details has been recorded. A doctor or care coordinator will review it and guide you on the next step.
patient_followup: Doctor reviewed your submission. Based on the current details, the case can move to follow-up consultation, test recommendation, or direct specialist referral. We will contact you soon with the next update.
groq: AptiCare demo response: this platform connects patients, doctors, researchers, and institutions through one digital portal. It can show intake summaries, support messages, follow-up guidance, and role-based healthcare information in a clear way.
gene_llm: Gene panel demo reply: the uploaded gene-related information can be organized into a readable summary with possible markers, observations, and next-step notes. This is only a showcase response and not a final medical diagnosis.
